headline: Most Stocks Gained, but Chip Selloff Drags Market
summary: The Nasdaq, the S&P 500, and the Dow ended Thursday's session lower, but if you take a closer look, most of the market is actually holding up all right.  The tech-heavy Nasdaq saw the most dramatic declines since tech stocks led the selloff, down 1.5%.  The S&P 500 fell 0.5% and the Dow dropped 0.2% or 105 points.

headline: Goldman Sachs (GS) Lifts Dividend 25% After Record Q2 Results
summary: Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) reported record Q2 2026 results, with strong contributions from investment banking, equities trading, and asset management. The company announced a 25% dividend increase and a $4b share repurchase program alongside the quarterly report. Management highlighted AI related investments and M&A activity as key themes for future business growth. For investors watching Goldman Sachs, the latest figures add to an already strong run for the stock. NYSE:GS last closed at...
